description: CompositionBlack textured cap made of 100% polyester lining and 100% nylon shell, with eyelets on the panels, branded tape on the inside on the seam lines, adjustable velcro closure at the back, puma badge printed on the front and mesh insideCareGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not ironDo not dry cleanWash with similar coloursUse detergent for coloursDo not wringStretch to original shape while dampGet ready to bring out the racing demon in you with this cap from puma. The eyelets keep you cool while the brand badge makes this one coveted cap. Team it with your Sports clothes or casuals when you go out in the sun and carry the Puma sporting spirit wherever you go.
